title: Viscerrack Pack
description: A small resource pack that attempts to make netherrack more similar to it's original counterpart, bloodstone.
body:
This pack aims to capture the visceral and somewhat bloody feel of pre-1.14 netherrack while retaining the modern style that's a lot easier on the eyes. Nether brick has also been changed to be lighter in color to match, looking more like it's Pocket Edition and Legacy Console Edition counterparts.

I threw this pack together in a day, so let me know your honest opinions about it! I'd love to make improvements in the future if any are needed.
